home.title: Capture
home.description: Each photograph captures a unique moment. Choose a frame, smile, and let each image preserve those small moments that deserve to stay with you forever.

select-frame.title: Frame Selection
select-frame.description: Each frame has a special style. Choose the one you like the most and start creating your memories.

error.message: Sorry, we couldn't load the frames at this moment. Please try again.

photo-booth.title: Take Photos
photo-booth.description: Get ready and let each photo capture a special moment.
photo-booth.confirm-change-frame: Are you sure you want to change the frame?

error.camera: Sorry, there was an error accessing the camera. Please try again or change the frame.
error.video: Sorry, there was an error with the video stream. Please try again or change the frame.

confirm.title: Confirm frame change
confirm.description: If you change the frame, you will lose the photos you've taken. Do you want to continue?

photo-strip.title: Your Special Memory
photo-strip.description: Your fantasy memory has been captured and is ready.

error.message: Sorry, we couldn't generate the photo strip at this moment. Please try again.

page-not-found.title: Page not found
page-not-found.description: Sorry, the page you're looking for doesn't exist. Please return to the home and start capturing magical moments.
